"'''Repel Boarders'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, by [[Sterling Hershey]]. It depicts a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] attack on the [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] diplomatic cruiser ''[[SkyWind III]]''.
